name: Solve F4 Cluster Instances
on: [push, workflow_dispatch]

jobs:
  build-matrix:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.matrix }}
      total: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.total }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build matrix
        id: make-matrix
        run: |
          python -c "import glob,json,os; files=sorted(glob.glob('test_data/data_demand_random/50/*.dat')); A=[4,8]; L=[60,90,120]; jobs=[]; jid=0; [jobs.append({'job_id':(jid:=jid+1),'instance':f,'base':os.path.basename(f),'A':a,'L':l,'reps':3,'truck_count':2,'drone_count':1}) for f in files for a in A for l in L]; json.dump(jobs, open('matrix.json','w')); print(json.dumps(jobs))"
          TOTAL=$(python -c "import json; print(len(json.load(open('matrix.json'))))")
          echo "matrix=$(cat matrix.json)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "total=$TOTAL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Total jobs: $TOTAL"

  solve:
    needs: build-matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 220
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        task: ${{ fromJson(needs.build-matrix.outputs.matrix) }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install deps
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y parallel
      - name: Build solver (Function4)
        run: g++ -std=c++17 C_Version/Function4.cpp -O2 -o C_Version/read_data_f4
      - name: Run task (2 runs parallel/job, stronger diversification knobs)
        run: |
          mkdir -p results
          : > cmds.txt
          for r in $(seq 1 ${{ matrix.task.reps }}); do
            echo "N_TRUCK=${{ matrix.task.truck_count }} N_DRONE=${{ matrix.task.drone_count }} SOL_OUT_DIR=results FIX_DEMAND_EQUAL1=1 SOLVER_TIME_LIMIT_SEC=7200 LS_LIGHT_SEEN_CAP=200000 LS_STRONG_SEEN_CAP=200000 ATS_SEG=12 ATS_DIV=3 ATS_MAX_ITERS=3000 LS_SHAKE_ON_STAGNATION=1 LS_SHAKE_TRIES=120 LS_RELAXED_MERGE=1 LS_EPS_MAKESPAN=0.02 LS_INSERT_CAND_PER_TRIP=120 LS_INSERT_EVAL_TOP=60 ./C_Version/read_data_f4 '${{ matrix.task.instance }}' '${{ matrix.task.A }}' '${{ matrix.task.L }}' > results/${{ matrix.task.base }}_A${{ matrix.task.A }}_L${{ matrix.task.L }}_r${r}.log" >> cmds.txt
          done
          cat cmds.txt
          parallel -j3 < cmds.txt

          python gha_write_run_meta.py \
            --results-dir results \
            --base "${{ matrix.task.base }}" \
            --a "${{ matrix.task.A }}" \
            --l "${{ matrix.task.L }}" \
            --reps "${{ matrix.task.reps }}" \
            --job-id "${{ matrix.task.job_id }}" \
            --instance "${{ matrix.task.instance }}"
      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: solvef4-job-${{ matrix.task.job_id }}
          path: results/

  summarize:
    needs: [build-matrix, solve]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: downloaded
      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          python -c "import json,pathlib,csv; rows=[json.load(open(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('downloaded').rglob('meta_run*.json') if p.is_file()]; out=pathlib.Path('summary_f4_t2_d1.csv'); f=open(out,'w',newline=''); fields=['job_id','instance','A','L','run_index','best_fitness','best_solution','best_multi_fitness','best_multi_solution','best_drone_avg_trip_time','best_total_sortie_time','best_multi_visit_trip_count','best_drone_trip_count','best_avg_customers_per_trip','best_multi_drone_avg_trip_time','best_multi_total_sortie_time','best_multi_multi_visit_trip_count','best_multi_drone_trip_count','best_multi_avg_customers_per_trip','best_solution_file','best_multi_solution_file','log','best_avg_sortie_time','best_avg_truck_wait_for_drone','best_avg_drone_wait_for_truck','best_multi_avg_sortie_time','best_multi_avg_truck_wait_for_drone','best_multi_avg_drone_wait_for_truck']; w=csv.DictWriter(f,fieldnames=fields,extrasaction='ignore'); w.writeheader(); w.writerows(sorted(rows,key=lambda x:(x['job_id'], x.get('run_index',0)))); f.close(); print(f'Wrote {len(rows)} rows to {out}')"
      - name: Build solver (Function4 validate)
        run: g++ -std=c++17 C_Version/Function4.cpp -O2 -o C_Version/read_data_function4
      - name: Recompute summary metrics with Function4
        id: recompute
        run: |
          set +e
          N_TRUCK=2 N_DRONE=1 SOLVER_BIN=C_Version/read_data_function4 PARALLEL_JOBS=8 \
            python recompute_metrics_from_solutions_csv.py summary_f4_t2_d1.csv
          rc=$?
          echo "rc=$rc" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          if [ -f batch_init_ats_improved_with_multivisit_recompute_failures.csv ]; then
            echo "Recompute failures report found."
            wc -l batch_init_ats_improved_with_multivisit_recompute_failures.csv || true
          fi
          exit 0
      - name: Upload summary
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: solvef4-summary-t2-d1
          path: |
            summary_f4_t2_d1.csv
            batch_init_ats_improved_with_multivisit_recompute_failures.csv
      - name: Fail job if recompute has errors
        if: steps.recompute.outputs.rc != '0'
        run: |
          echo "Recompute returned non-zero exit code: ${{ steps.recompute.outputs.rc }}"
          exit 1
